title: Luffy Stumbles into Nami’s Plan
description: On pages 9–11, this part begins the Orange Town storyline, where Nami’s schemes and Buggy’s crew pull Luffy and Zoro into a new conflict.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HEY... A GIRL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WHAT'S WRONG, GIRL? HARRHARHAR! ARE YOU DEAD?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: OH... I'm seeing things...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...THERE CAN'T BE ANYONE HERE IN THE VAST SEA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I DON'T KNOW WHO YOU ARE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...but could you spare a little water?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: AND MAYBE A PIECE OF BREAD?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm lost at sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: IF YOU WANT GOLD, TAKE IT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But please... help me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sure, we'll help you...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: BUT FIRST LET'S JUST TAKE A PEEK IN THAT TREASURE CHEST!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: GO AHEAD, TAKE WHATEVER YOU WANT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BUT PLEASE... SOME WATER!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: PATIENCE LITTLE LADY! FIRST, WE GOTTA SEE YOUR TREASURE!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Har hair Klomp

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: AFTER ALL, WE'RE SAVING YOUR LIFE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: TAKE THE WHOLE SHIP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hee hee

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's All Yours!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She's leaving with our ship... and our treasure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! This chest is empty!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DARK CLOUDS COMING IN LOW FROM THE SOUTH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That means a cold front, folks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: With a strong likely- hood of violent showers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: THERE'S A SQUALL LINE HEADING THIS WAY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Small vessels should take precautions against capsizing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ARRGH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: BINGO!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: SO LONG! AND THANKS FOR THE TREASURE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: S-She tricked us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We'll get you for this!

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
